[Skip to main content](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/34681678535191-Thinker-AI-Teaching-Assistant#main-content)

Plan Availability- Plus


Legacy Plans- Plus


Platform- Plus


_Equip your course with Thinker, Thinkific's AI Teaching Assistant - a powerful, 24/7 AI-powered assistant ready to support your students and boost engagement._

* * *

### Available with Thinkific Plus

##### Connect with our team to upgrade to Plus

* * *

## In this article:

[About This Feature](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/34681678535191-Thinker-AI-Teaching-Assistant#about)

[How It Works](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/34681678535191-Thinker-AI-Teaching-Assistant#how)

[Important Considerations](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/34681678535191-Thinker-AI-Teaching-Assistant#important)

[Setting Up Thinker](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/34681678535191-Thinker-AI-Teaching-Assistant#setup)

[Publishing Thinker](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/34681678535191-Thinker-AI-Teaching-Assistant#publish)

[Assistant Analytics](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/34681678535191-Thinker-AI-Teaching-Assistant#analytics)

[Thinker Pricing](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/34681678535191-Thinker-AI-Teaching-Assistant#pricing)

[Frequently Asked Questions](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/34681678535191-Thinker-AI-Teaching-Assistant#faq)

## About This Feature

Thinker is your always-on course companion, designed to answer questions about your content, support your customers as they learn, and save you from replying to the same questions - helping you grow revenue without needing to expand your team.

Thinker provides your users a quick and reliable conversational experience, powered by your learning content. Embedded directly in your [Course Player](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030372514-The-Thinkific-Course-Player), it delivers timely, relevant answers leveraging your existing content.

You can customize Thinker with a unique name, icon, and inject its language with your brand’s voice and tone. You control which of your courses it can reference and include in its responses to your users, and measure its engagement and usefulness with analytics and insight tracking.

In addition to using your course lessons, Thinker can also leverage general reference documents that you upload as PDFs. These documents don’t need to be part of a specific course and are ideal for things like support documentation, policies, or reference guides. Thinker will use the content from these PDFs to provide richer, more accurate answers to your learners, while keeping the original documents private.

Thinker is available to customers on Plus plans. Every Thinkific Plus plan includes a monthly allotment of Thinker credits that reset at the start of each month. Learn more about [pricing below](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/34681678535191-Thinker-AI-Teaching-Assistant#pricing).

![AI TA - Course Player.jpg](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/article_attachments/34741595549847)

## How It Works

Thinker appears as a button in the [Course Player](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030372514-The-Thinkific-Course-Player) for any course that it has been trained on. Clicking the button opens the chat interface alongside the course content, similar to [Discussions](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030351434).

From the chat window, learners can ask questions and get helpful, sourced responses in your tone of voice, making them feel seen and supported. Every response from Thinker includes a thumbs up/thumbs down option - this feedback is tracked in the analytics, showing you the total number of positive and negative responses to help gauge Thinker's effectiveness.

## Important Considerations

- Thinker, AI Teaching Assistant, is available to customers on Plus plans. Every Thinkific Plus plan includes a monthly allotment of Thinker credits that reset at the start of each month. If you're already a Plus customer, reach out to your [dedicated Customer Success Manager](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360048081893) to learn more. Curious, but not yet on Plus? [Discover how Plus can supercharge your business growth](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/34681678535191#form).
- Thinker can use content from [published](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030738133-Publishing-Your-Products) courses (including [draft content](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030740533-Creating-Draft-Content-for-Your-Course) within those courses) as well as PDF documents that you upload directly to Thinker as general reference material.
- When using uploaded PDFs as references:
  - Uploaded PDFs are private by default. Learners will not see, download, or be directly linked to these documents from the Thinker chat. Instead, Thinker uses them behind the scenes to improve the quality and completeness of its answers.
  - Uploaded PDFs are not tied to a specific course. They act as global content, so Thinker can use them to answer questions from any learner it’s enabled for—regardless of which course the learner is currently viewing.
  - Use uploaded PDFs for general or support-type resources that don’t fit neatly into your course structure (for example, help center articles, process documentation, or company policies).
  - This feature is currently limited to PDF files. Other file types (such as Word documents, spreadsheets, videos, etc.) are not yet supported. Currently only text content from PDF files will be index. Any photos, diagrams, or other graphic content within these files will be ignored.
- At this time, Thinker is enabled on a per-course basis and cannot be restricted to a specific group of students within that course. It also operates with a global scope, meaning it will draw answers from all courses it has been trained on, regardless of which course the learner is currently on.

## Setting Up Thinker

To access Thinker from the [Admin Dashboard](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030719833-Admin-Dashboard-A-Closer-Look):

1. Go to **Products**
2. Select **Teaching Assistant**

When setting up Thinker for the first time, you will see a **Set up Thinker** button - clicking this will enable Thinker and will take you to its settings, where you can customize different aspects of Thinker, including the voice and tone as well as the courses that it will have access to.

To customize Thinker, simply click on one of the following tabs to go into the settings:

**Appearance and style**

Here, you can define the characteristics of Thinker:

- **Name:** The unique name for Thinker that is displayed in the chat.
- **Profile image:** The image for Thinker that is displayed in the chat.
- **Greeting message:** The first message that Thinker will send to the learner when they open the chat window.
- **Voice and tone:** Guidance that will inform the conversation style between Thinker and learners, such as formality and personality.
- **Button label:** The text displayed on the button that opens the chat.
- **Channel header name:** The name that is displayed at the top of the chat.

After making any changes to Thinker's voice and style, click the **Save** button to save your changes.

![AI TA - Voice and style.jpg](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/article_attachments/34740883661335)

**Content access and use**

First, set the courses that Thinker will have access to:

1. Click the dropdown and select a course
2. Click **Sync**

> Only [published](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/360030738133-Publishing-Your-Products) courses will be available to select from the dropdown.

Then, select the _Content use_ that you would like to set for Thinker:

- **Use all synced content**: Allows Thinker to reference any synced courses, even if the user is not enrolled in them.
- **Match user access**: Only allows Thinker to reference courses the user is enrolled in.

Once added, the course content will automatically begin syncing to Thinker, with the status of this being displayed under _Status_ column, and will display a green _Synced_ status once they are fully synced.

If you have important information that doesn’t belong in a specific course - like a support knowledge base, company policies, or onboarding guides - you can upload it as a PDF. When Thinker uses this content to answer learner questions, it will keep the original documents hidden, so learners only see the relevant answer, not the raw source.

To upload a PDF:

1. Click **Upload a PDF**
2. Drag and drop your desired PDF (or browse and select a file from your device)

_Supported file types: .pdf (max file size 25 MB)_

If any new content is added to a course that Thinker has access to, it will display a yellow _Out of date_ status. To resync the new content to Thinker:

1. Click the **ellipsis (three dots)** icon next to the course
2. Click **Manually sync**

![Thinker - Content permissions.jpg](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/article_attachments/34740639036311)

## Publishing Thinker

Initially, Thinker will only be visible to admin users. After you have customized it to your liking and have added your desired courses for it to access, you can publish it to make it available for your learners!

To publish Thinker:

1. Click the **Publish** button in the top-right corner
2. Click **Publish**

And that's it! Thinker will now be available in the Course Player for your learners to interact with. You can also unpublish Thinker at any time by following the above steps and clicking **Unpublish**.

### Previewing Thinker

If you'd like to see how Thinker will look from a learner's perspective before publishing it, you can do so by previewing it.

To preview Thinker, simply click on the **Preview** button in the top-right corner.

## Thinker Analytics

Thinker has its own dedicated analytics, providing insights into its usage and effective with your learners, such as total users, number of responses, estimated hours saved, and most active students.

The analytics page also includes a detailed message history, allowing you to review all conversations or filter them by a specific user to see their interactions, as well as view which responses your learners marked as thumbs up or thumbs down.

To access Thinker analytics:

1. From your Admin Dashboard, select to **Analytics**
2. Select **Engagement**
3. Select the **Thinker** tab

Learn more about Thinkific's analytics dashboards: [Thinkific Analytics: Engagement Dashboards](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/15795863469463-Thinkific-Analytics-Engagement-Dashboards).

## Thinker Pricing

Thinker is available to customers on Plus plans. Every Thinkific Plus plan includes a monthly allotment of Thinker credits that reset at the start of each month. Unused credits do not roll over.

Each time Thinker answers a learner’s question, one credit is used. For example, if a learner asks Thinker, “Where can I find the workbook?” and Thinker replies with the answer, that uses one credit. As learners receive responses from Thinker, credits are consumed and reflected in your admin dashboard from the [Thinker Analytics table](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/34681678535191-Thinker-AI-Teaching-Assistant#analytics).

If you have reached your monthly credit allotment, reach out to your Customer Success Manager to explore your options.

## Frequently Asked Questions

For all frequently asked questions about this feature, check out our [AI Teaching Assistant FAQ](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/35007607256599-AI-Teaching-Assistant-FAQ).

[\[back to top\]](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/34681678535191-Thinker-AI-Teaching-Assistant#top)

[Previous article Swiss](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/34881009457175-Swiss) [Next article Timecodes](https://support.thinkific.com/hc/en-us/articles/34678744903319-Timecodes)

[Thinkific News](https://www.thinkific.com/blog/category/thinkific-news/)

# Introducing Thinker: Your AI Teaching Assistant

By

###### Stephanie Sullivan

on

February 24, 2026

What if every learner in your course could get instant, personalized support without you answering the same question twice?

Meet [**Thinker**](https://www.thinkific.com/features/thinker-ai/), Thinkific’s new AI Teaching Assistant. Thinker is your always-on course companion, designed to answer questions about your content, guide learners to the right materials, and support engagement at scale so you can grow revenue without growing your team.

Here’s how it works and why it changes the game for growing education businesses.

## **How Thinker works**

Thinker is built directly into your learning experience and powered by your content.

Once enabled, you can choose what existing courses, lessons and materials it has access to.

There’s no need to upload files into a separate system, manually train a model, or create complicated prompts. Thinker understands your course content and responds to learners in real time.

When a learner asks a question inside your course, Thinker analyzes your content and provides a contextual, accurate response based only on what you’ve taught.

Your content stays yours, and is never used to train external AI models. It is used only to support your unique learning experience. [See: Keeping Data Safe with Thinker](https://www.thinkific.com/blog/keeping-data-safe-thinkific-teaching-assistant/).

Thinker is especially effective at:

- **Explaining concepts from your course** in clear, accessible language

- **Helping learners find specific lessons or topics** without searching through modules

- **Summarizing lessons and materials** to reinforce key takeaways

- **Quizzing learners to check understanding** and deepen retention

- **Providing practical examples** to make abstract ideas more concrete

- **Supporting problem-solving** using your frameworks and methodologies


Because Thinker is embedded directly within your learning environment, support feels seamless and immediate. Learners don’t have to leave the course or wait for a response. They get clarity exactly when they need it.

For you, that means fewer repetitive questions, stronger engagement, and a learning experience that feels responsive at scale.

## **The benefits of Thinker**

### **1\. Scale support without scaling headcount**

If you run a growing education business, you know the pattern. As enrollment increases, so do repetitive questions:

- “Where can I find this lesson?”
- “How do I apply this framework?”
- “What did you mean by this concept?”

Thinker offloads those repetitive course-related questions and responds instantly with accurate information from your content.

You get time back to focus on strategy, product development, and growth instead of inbox triage.

### **2\. Keep your brand front and center**

Thinker is not a generic chatbot bolted onto your site.

It’s fully customized to your tone of voice and embedded directly into your course experience, so it feels like a natural extension of your brand.

Your customers experience seamless, aligned support that reflects your expertise and values.

### **3\. Power content discovery and engagement**

Many learners disengage not because your content lacks value, but because they get stuck or overwhelmed.

Thinker guides learners to relevant content at the right time, helping them discover lessons, revisit important modules, and apply what they’re learning. The result? Stronger engagement, better learning outcomes and more satisfied customers.

### **4\. Identify new revenue opportunities**

Thinker doesn’t just answer questions. It can also recommend additional courses at the right moment in the learning journey.

When a learner demonstrates interest in a topic or completes a milestone, Thinker can guide them toward relevant next-step offers. That opens the door to:

- Higher lifetime value
- Smarter cross-sells
- Organic upsell opportunities inside your existing audience

It’s support and growth working together.

## **Ready to empower your learners?**

[Register for our free masterclass on Thinker.](https://www.thinkific.com/resources/webinar-the-thinker-advantage/)

**By the end of this session, you’ll:**

- Know exactly how to activate Thinker and start personalizing your learning experience
- Understand how an AI teaching assistant helps scale personalization without sacrificing quality
- See how Thinker guides learners using your content while protecting your IP and access rules
- Learn how Plus customers are reducing support time and improving engagement with Thinker

[![](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Screenshot-2026-03-03-at-9.14.11-AM-1024x412.png)](https://www.thinkific.com/resources/webinar-the-thinker-advantage/)

web.title: Meet Thinker: Your AI-powered teaching assistant - Thinkific
web.description: Thinker gives your learners instant answers to their course and content questions — helping free up your time without adding headcount.
web.markdown:
Features

\|

Thinker AI

# Meet Thinker: Your AI-powered teaching assistant

Thinker gives your learners instant answers to their course and content questions — helping them stay on track, complete more lessons, and free up your time without adding headcount.

Want to learn more or activate Thinker? Book a chat with our sales team today.

[Talk to sales](https://www.thinkific.com/plus/plus-customer-enquiries/?exp=thinker-ai)

![Thinker AI preview](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/digitaldownloads-hero.jpg)

## Higher learner satisfaction without hiring more team members

While others just focus on AI admin tools that power content creation, Thinker actually works to improve the overall learner experience so they complete courses faster, stay engaged longer, and get more value from your content.

### Accelerate learner success

Deliver instant, personalized guidance that helps learners find the right content at the right time and complete courses with greater satisfaction. Happy learners become repeat customers.

![a man using support](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/home-features-3.png)

### Reclaim your time with scalable support

Cut support time dramatically by delivering accurate answers about your content automatically. Focus your energy on growth and engagement, not repetitive questions.

### Increase revenue per learner

Unlock new revenue by guiding learners toward additional content when they need it — driving upsells, cross-sells, and long-term customer value.

### How Thinker works

Unlike third-party AI chat tools, Thinker automatically gains access to your content and integrates directly into the learning experience. It delivers precise, contextual support and highlights the most relevant resources right when your learners need them.

#### The fastest way to add AI to your learning experience

No manual training required. Unlike other AI solutions, when you grant Thinker access to your existing content, you won’t need to organize, reformat, update, or upload materials manually.

![modules syncing](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Frame-1547742159.jpg)

![Thinker AI providing instructions](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/digitaldownloads-features-5.svg)

#### An extension of you and your brand

Keep your brand front and center with an AI assistant you can name, fully customize to your tone of voice, and embed directly in your course experience. Thinker sounds like you, not a robot.

#### An expert you and your learners can trust

Offload repetitive questions about course content and power content discovery with an assistant that responds instantly with accurate information.

![teaching assistant in action](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Thinker_Modal_V2.gif)

![Thinker AI answers a questions](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/digitaldownloads-features-5-1.svg)

#### Identifies new revenue opportunities

Thinker suggests additional learning content at the perfect moment — when learners are most engaged and ready to invest further.

![](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Aragon-Headshot-Stephen-Ekstrom-2025-10-03-4.jpeg)

“Thinker helps us amplify the learner experience—supporting self-discovery, responding with a more personal tone, and engaging people in ways that reflect how they actually learn. The result is learning that’s more effective, more relatable, and more memorable at a scale we simply couldn’t achieve manually.”

Stephen Ekstrom,

CEO and Co-Founder of Learn Tourism

### How Thinker keeps your content safe and secure

We know you have questions about how your content and data are used with AI. With enterprise-grade security, clear content ownership, and safeguards built in, we’re committed to privacy and your peace of mind.

▼

Your content never trains AI models

Thinkific only partners with companies that contractually agree not to train their models on your content (including AWS Bedrock, Google AI, and OpenAI). If any data improves platform-level functionality, it’s anonymized or aggregated — never attributed to you.

►

You own inputs and outputs

You retain full ownership of both the content you create and everything Thinker generates based on your content. We will never use your content (original or AI-generated) without your explicit consent.

►

Built-in safeguards against harmful content

Multiple protections reduce the risk of inappropriate AI-generated content, including moderation filters and alignment with OWASP Top 10 for large language model applications.

►

Enterprise-grade partner vetting

Every AI sub-processor undergoes security, privacy, and legal reviews — the same rigor a Fortune 100 CIO would demand. We sign Standard Contractual Clauses and continuously monitor performance. If we add a new sub-processor, you’ll receive at least 15 days’ notice via email.

►

Minimal data retention

Data shared with sub-processors exists off-platform only long enough to fulfill requests and satisfy short-term abuse monitoring. After that, it’s deleted.

►

Global compliance standards

Thinkific complies with GDPR (Europe), CPRA (California), GRPA (South Korea), Québec’s Law 25, Canada’s PIPEDA, and other applicable regulations. We follow best practices for responsible AI and data use.

►

Independently verified security

We hold SOC 2 Type 2 certification, conduct quarterly third-party penetration tests, and operate 24/7 SIEM monitoring. Your courses are encrypted at rest and in transit, with multi-factor authentication and least-privilege access available.

![a man and a woman looking at an ipad](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/sellingtools-accordion-1.jpg)

## Frequently asked questions

▼

Can Thinker's responses be customized?

Yes. You can customize several aspects of Thinker:

- **Name and icon color:** Choose how Thinker is displayed to learners.
- **Greeting message:** Customize the initial message learners see, including sample questions to guide them.
- **Voice and tone:** Personalize Thinker’s tone of voice to be playful, formal, or whatever suits your brand best.

►

Can I see how my learners are using Thinker?

Yes. A dedicated analytics page provides insights into total users and the number of responses, estimated number of hours saved using Thinker, most active users, and message volume over time.

►

How long does it take to train Thinker?

Training Thinker is quick and easy. Select the courses you want it to learn from, and it’ll automatically pull your existing content and be ready to guide your learners in minutes.

►

What plan is Thinker available on?

Thinker is currently available on Thinkific Plus plans only.

## Ready to improve the learner experience while saving time and boosting revenue?

Experience personalized, learner-focused AI support with Thinker.

[Talk to sales](https://www.thinkific.com/plus/plus-customer-enquiries/?exp=thinker-ai)

![Group of professionals having a discussion](https://www.thinkific.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/courses-footerCTA.jpg)

web.title: Thinkific Launches Thinker: An AI Assistant That Personalizes ...
web.description: Always-on AI assistant learns from your proprietary content and courses to deliver personalized recommendations, instant answers, ...
web.markdown:
[Accessibility Statement](https://www.cision.com/about/accessibility/) [Skip Navigation](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/thinkific-launches-thinker-an-ai-assistant-that-personalizes-learner-support-at-scale-302695153.html#main)

_Always-on AI assistant learns from your proprietary content and courses to deliver personalized recommendations, instant answers, and scalable learner support_

VANCOUVER, BC, Feb. 24, 2026 /PRNewswire/ - Thinkific Labs Inc. (" **Thinkific**", or " **our**") (TSX: THNC), a leading learning commerce platform for creating and delivering online learning experiences, today announced the launch of Thinker, an AI teaching assistant designed to enhance learner success, reduce support burden, and help education businesses grow revenue without expanding their teams.

[Continue Reading](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/thinkific-launches-thinker-an-ai-assistant-that-personalizes-learner-support-at-scale-302695153.html#continue-jump)

![Thinker, an AI teaching assistant (CNW Group/Thinkific Labs Inc.)](https://mma.prnewswire.com/media/2918769/Thinkific_Labs_Inc__Thinkific_Launches_Thinker__An_AI_Assistant.jpg?w=500)

Thinker, an AI teaching assistant (CNW Group/Thinkific Labs Inc.)


Thinker is part of Thinkific's broader approach to embedding AI across the learning experience, helping customers create courses and deliver more engaging, supportive learning experiences. Available anytime learners need help - day or night - Thinker learns directly from your proprietary content including courses and other assets to deliver smart, contextual recommendations and instant answers within the learning experience. As customers add more content, Thinker's knowledge base expands, enabling it to draw from a broader set of course materials when responding to learner questions. With a fully customizable tone and seamless integration into the Thinkific platform, it functions like an on-brand assistant embedded into every course.

"One of the most persistent challenges education businesses face is maintaining high-quality learner support while scaling," said Greg Smith, CEO of Thinkific. "Too often, growth means choosing between learner satisfaction and operational efficiency. Thinker is designed to address this by providing AI-assisted support that can respond to learner questions around the clock, drawing from your proprietary content, media, courses and other assets to deliver contextual answers without requiring additional staff."

Thinkific built Thinker with strong privacy and security standards. Customers retain full ownership of their content, and Thinkific does not use customer content or data to train large language models. Content is used only to power the intended experience within the platform, and Thinker includes safeguards designed to promote accurate, responsible responses.

Thinker addresses these challenges by:

- **Supporting learner success:** Provides easier navigation, faster answers, and personalized experiences that is intended to support higher completion rates and satisfaction
- **Scaling support efficiently:** Offloads repetitive questions from educators, freeing them to focus on high-value interactions
- **Maintaining brand consistency:** Offers fully customizable tone to ensure every interaction aligns with a business's unique voice

Early customers are already using Thinker to enhance learner engagement at scale. Learn Tourism, a global education platform serving tourism professionals, offers over 145 courses on Thinkific and uses Thinker to support thousands of learners worldwide across its certification and professional development programs.

"AI tools have helped us grow, scale, and better serve our community across Learn Tourism. Thinker helps us amplify the learner experience, supporting self-discovery, responding with a more personal tone, and engaging people in ways that reflect how they actually learn" said Stephen Ekstrom, CEO and Co-founder of [Learn Tourism](https://edge.prnewswire.com/c/link/?t=0&l=en&o=4625620-1&h=196504577&u=https%3A%2F%2Flearntourism.org%2F%3Futm_term%26gad_source%3D1%26gad_campaignid%3D22756415428%26gbraid%3D0AAAAAqZZyqHUjYPPZP0Wzbi2a81jAG93s&a=Learn+Tourism). "The result is learning that's more effective, more relatable, and more memorable at a scale we simply couldn't achieve manually."

Thinker is included with Thinkific Plus plans today and uses a credit based model, with monthly credits included and flexible options to support higher usage. Thinker will be available beginning February 24, 2026. For more information, visit [\[website URL\]](https://edge.prnewswire.com/c/link/?t=0&l=en&o=4625620-1&h=2216783876&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.thinkific.com%2Ffeatures%2Fthinker-ai%2F&a=%5Bwebsite+URL%5D).

**About Thinkific**

Thinkific (TSX:THNC) is an award-winning learning commerce platform where courses and community come together to power business growth. Thinkific gives academies, experts, and businesses everything they need to create and sell online learning experiences, build communities, and grow their revenue — all from one platform. More than 35,000 customers — including companies like GoDaddy, Nasdaq, and ActiveCampaign — have generated billions in revenue using Thinkific, impacting more than 200 million people worldwide.

For more information, please visit [www.thinkific.com](https://edge.prnewswire.com/c/link/?t=0&l=en&o=4625620-1&h=4039512496&u=https%3A%2F%2Fc212.net%2Fc%2Flink%2F%3Ft%3D0%26l%3Den%26o%3D4448925-1%26h%3D2732587723%26u%3Dhttp%253A%252F%252Fwww.thinkific.com%252F%26a%3Dwww.thinkific.com&a=www.thinkific.com).

_This news release contains forward-looking information within the meaning of applicable securities laws, including statements regarding Thinker's expected benefits, future product capabilities, the expected availability date of February 24, 2026, and Thinkific's broader AI vision. These statements are based on current expectations and assumptions, including: continued customer adoption of Thinkific Plus; the performance and reliability of the underlying large language model technology; and the continued availability of third-party AI infrastructure on which Thinker relies. Thinker utilizes third-party large language model infrastructure to generate responses to learner questions. Forward-looking statements are subject to risks and uncertainties that could cause actual results to differ materially, including: customer adoption rates for Thinker may vary and may not meet expectations; AI-generated responses may not always be accurate or contextually appropriate; the product's performance depends on third-party AI infrastructure that is outside of Thinkific's control; and competitive dynamics in the AI-assisted learning market may affect product adoption and differentiation. Forward-looking statements are not guarantees of future performance. Additional risks and uncertainties are described in greater detail in the Company's Annual Information Form dated March 5, 2025, available on SEDAR+ at [www.sedarplus.ca](https://edge.prnewswire.com/c/link/?t=0&l=en&o=4625620-1&h=3156148410&u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.sedarplus.ca%2F&a=www.sedarplus.ca). Thinkific does not undertake to update forward-looking information, except as required by applicable securities legislation._
